column1: Hey Ricardo, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
R u guys associated w the events livin life is doing?
Cool bro! we aren't thats a different company
were you lookin for Cabo info?
Wanted to know what resorts you guys are at and the events y'all are doing
Also potentially if y'all sell events/tickets separate from rooms or if it's just one package
Got you, yea we do parties separate too. Our main resort is the Riu Santa Fe but we also have groups at the Tesoro
how many ppl in your group so far?
Funny enough we just bought a room for 3 at the Santa Fe from the 8th-12th.
How would it look then if we did the parties separate?
Word dope. yea we have a party pass that comes with express entry and cover charge to Squid Roe, Mandala, La Vaquita, and our booze cruise event
its a pretty smooth set up. I can send you details
How much is the party pass?
And also just for info are all these companies doing the same bars on the same nights?
each night has its own individual price. ill email it all over if thats cool just lmk where to send it
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Just checked regular and spam I haven't gotten it
I'll try resending again, mind checking your 'All Mail' tab too
Sometimes it's in promotions since there's pricing in there
Yea you were right just found the one sent yesterday my b
Would there be any way we could just purchase the tickets to the 3 clubs and not the barge?
Hey Spiffy just wanted to check back and see because we want to be able to secure this tickets my guy
Whats good bro, you wanted to do just the 3 clubs right
My bad on the late response
We can def lock that in
We can do like 2 nights at Squid Roe if interested. so you get 4 nights out. or did you just want 3 nights
Word up to you just want to let you know its an option
But also do all these companies all go to the same places on the same nights? Like ik they all do same locations but don't know if same dates
Liked “Word up to you just want to let you know its an option”
Idk if u know or not just want to make sure we go when everything is the best
And we're in for 4 nights let's do it
aight bet! will send this over in 10
and which other companies you referring to? all the venues are packed to the brim theres only bout 3-4 main clubs down there so ppl from everywhere will be there
just sent that party pass over lmk if you got it
Got the link thanks my man
But also how do I get it to where we all can pay, do I send them the link and then they fill out that join reservation part?
Checking out now thanks my man!
Got an email about arranging transportation and I was wondering if I could get a bit more info on how it works
yoyo, disregard that. that email is for our travelers that have the full hotel stay through us
we dont handle transportation with party pass only bookings
yoo bro! just wanted to double confirm, what days will you be in Cabo? is it the 8-14?

Aight word. so Mandala nightclub just re-released their schedule and its only available on March 12 which is the day you leave. so couple options, we can substitute that with either the booze cruise event, or another night at Squid Roe (which is the most lit spot)
or I can take it off completely and reimburse y'all for that night
What day would the booze cruise be?
at the moment its scheduled for the 10th
I think we are just gonna go with the reimbursement for that night
okay word no problem bro. will get that started
should be in progress now brotha
